description: Trigger accuracy evals for the monte-carlo-instrument-agent skill. Each case tests whether a single prompt should activate the skill.

cases.prompt: I have a long-running LangChain agent in Python — can you instrument it for Monte Carlo Agent Observability?
cases.rationale: Direct request to instrument a LangChain agent for MC — core skill use case

cases.prompt: Set up Monte Carlo tracing on my LangGraph workflow.
cases.rationale: Direct instrument request for a supported library (LangGraph)

cases.prompt: We're using the OpenAI SDK for our chat agent. How do I add Monte Carlo instrumentation?
cases.rationale: Direct instrument request for OpenAI SDK calls

cases.prompt: Instrument my Anthropic-based agent with the Monte Carlo OpenTelemetry SDK.
cases.rationale: Direct instrument request for an Anthropic SDK agent

cases.prompt: Can you add MC tracing to our CrewAI multi-agent system?
cases.rationale: Direct instrument request for CrewAI

cases.prompt: I need to wire up Monte Carlo Agent Observability for an Amazon Bedrock agent.
cases.rationale: Direct instrument request for Bedrock

cases.prompt: Help me instrument a SageMaker-hosted agent so its traces show up in Monte Carlo.
cases.rationale: Direct instrument request for SageMaker

cases.prompt: Add Monte Carlo tracing to my Vertex AI agent code.
cases.rationale: Direct instrument request for Vertex AI

cases.prompt: Instrument my Lambda agent for Monte Carlo — it runs as a serverless function.
cases.rationale: Lambda/serverless instrument request — skill detects serverless and switches to SimpleSpanProcessor

cases.prompt: Set up MC tracing on this agent.
cases.rationale: Generic agent tracing setup request — verb "set up tracing" routes to instrument-agent

cases.prompt: Set up agent observability.
cases.rationale: Bare "agent observability" phrase is intentionally ambiguous; per design decision (Bayard) this routes to instrument-agent because producing traces is the prerequisite to monitoring them

cases.prompt: Help me set up monitoring for my AI agents — I want to track latency and token usage.
cases.rationale: Verb is "monitor/track" not "instrument" — route to monte-carlo-monitoring-advisor (consumes traces, doesn't produce them)

cases.prompt: Which of our AI agents have the worst latency? I want to create alerts for them.
cases.rationale: Alert creation on agent metrics — route to monte-carlo-monitoring-advisor

cases.prompt: I want to monitor my agent's response quality and catch runaway tool call loops.
cases.rationale: Agent quality monitoring and trajectory alerting — route to monte-carlo-monitoring-advisor

cases.prompt: We got a freshness alert on raw_events. What happened and what's downstream?
cases.rationale: Active alert triage — route to incident-response skill

cases.prompt: Why did this agent latency alert fire last night? Help me investigate the incident.
cases.rationale: Incident investigation on a fired alert — route to incident-response skill

cases.prompt: I need to push table metadata from our Snowflake warehouse to Monte Carlo. Where do I start?
cases.rationale: Push metadata ingestion — route to montecarlo-push-ingestion skill

cases.prompt: Build me a metadata collector for Snowflake that pushes to Monte Carlo.
cases.rationale: Metadata collector script generation — route to montecarlo-push-ingestion skill

cases.prompt: Build me a Connection Auth Rules config for our Snowflake connection.
cases.rationale: Connection Auth Rules config generation — route to connection-auth-rules skill

cases.prompt: I want to evaluate my chat agent's answer relevance and alert if it drops below a threshold.
cases.rationale: Agent evaluation monitor creation — route to monte-carlo-monitoring-advisor (verb is "evaluate/alert", not "instrument")

cases.prompt: How do I push query logs from Databricks to Monte Carlo?
cases.rationale: Push query log ingestion — route to montecarlo-push-ingestion skill
